zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas John Hodsoll於1505年出生在英國肯特韋斯特 馬林時，他的父親William Hodsoll20歲，母親Ella Jane Beaulieu15歲。他於1530年與Isabell在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1553年8月17日在英國英格蘭素可考福爾德享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特艾什。

nameMeanings.name: Hodsoll
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Hodsoll (Staffs) or Hodsoll Street in Ash (Kent).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas John Hodsoll was born in 1505, in West Malling, Kent, England, his father, William Hodsoll, was 20 and his mother, Ella Jane Beaulieu, was 15. He married Isabell in 1530, in United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 17 August 1553, in Cowfold, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Ash, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas John Hodsoll est né en 1505, à West Malling, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William Hodsoll, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Ella Jane Beaulieu, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Isabell en 1530, à Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 17 août 1553, à Cowfold, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Ash, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St. Albans, England: St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas John Hodsoll 1505 in West Malling, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Hodsoll 20 und seine Mutter Ella Jane Beaulieu 15. Er hat 1530 in United Kingdom Isabell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 17. August 1553 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Cowfold, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ash, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas John Hodsoll è nato il nel 1505 nel West Malling, Kent, England, il suo padre, William Hodsoll, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Ella Jane Beaulieu, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Isabell nel 1530, nel Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 17 agosto 1553, nel Cowfold, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Ash, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas John Hodsollが1505年にイギリスケントウエスト マリングで生まれた時，父William Hodsollは20歳，母Ella Jane Beaulieuは15歳であった。1530年にイギリスでIsabellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1553年8月17日にイギリスイギリススセックスコウフォルドで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントアッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas John Hodsoll(이)가 1505년 영국 켄트 웨스트 맬링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Hodsoll(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Ella Jane Beaulieu(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1530년 영국에서 Isabell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1553년 8월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 코우폴드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 애시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas John Hodsoll nasceu em 1505, em West Malling, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Hodsoll, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Ella Jane Beaulieu, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabell em 1530, em United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1553, em Cowfold, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Ash, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas John Hodsoll родился в 1505 г. в местности вест маллинг, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени William Hodsoll было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Ella Jane Beaulieu, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabell в 1530 г. в местности Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 17 августа 1553 г. в местности коуфолд, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности аш, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas John Hodsoll nació en 1505, en West Malling, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, William Hodsoll, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Ella Jane Beaulieu, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Isabell en 1530, en Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1553, en Cowfold, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Ash, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
